title: Java Class Names should comply with the Naming Convention
description: Shared naming conventions allow teams to collaborate efficiently. This rule raises an issue when a class name does not match a provided regular expression.
recommendation: Rename the class to match the provided regular expression. For example, a class 'my_class' should be renamed to 'MyClass' with the default provided regular expression.
impact: Improper class name may lead to confusion and difficulty in understanding the purpose of the class. It impacts the readability and maintainability of the code.

checks.message: Class name should follow PascalCase convention
